mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "MY_COOKING" ("USERNAME","COOKING_TITLE","COOKING_RECIPE","COOKING_CONTENTS","COOKING_DATE") VALUES (#{username},#{cookingTitle},#{cookingRecipe},#{cookingContents},now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM "MY_COOKING" m LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT ON ("COOKING_NUM") "COOKING_NUM", "FILE_NAME" FROM "COOKING_FILE" ORDER BY "COOKING_NUM", "FILE_NUM" ASC ) f USING ("COOKING_NUM") WHERE m."COOKING_DATE" >= (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')::date AND m."COOKING_DATE" < ((now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')::date + INTERVAL '1 day') ORDER BY m."COOKING_NUM" DESC LIMIT 4
